title: Scoped personal access tokens will soon be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Scoped personal access tokens will be available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled in late May 2026.

Scoped personal access tokens restrict a PAT's permissions to specific API operations by assigning one or more API scopes, instead of granting the creating identity's full workspace access.

See [Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)](/aws/en/dev-tools/auth/pat).

ref_links.text: Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)
